description: A plain candid operational photograph with no on-image text or graphic design, documenting the arrest described in the tweet (a woman arrested at the USCIS Miami field office on an outstanding warrant). Shot from behind in an office corridor with blue carpet, glass-walled offices, and fluorescent ceiling lighting, two law-enforcement officers in tan/khaki uniforms with black tactical vests labeled 'SHERIFF' (yellow lettering) and visible holstered sidearms escort a detained woman (dark clothing, hair in a bun, hands apparently restrained behind her back) down the hallway away from the camera. The image is a documentary photo of an in-custody escort, not a designed meme/poster.
